headlines.title: Israel launches broad airstrikes on Iranian infrastructure as war enters fifth day
headlines.summary: Israel initiates wide-ranging strikes on Iran's infrastructure amid the fifth day of war with the U.S., featuring explosions in Tehran and Jerusalem and over 50,000 U.S. troops deployed. Middle East stability hangs in balance, risking oil disruptions; U.S. Congress weighs intervention limits.

framings.angle: Highlighted Israel's broad strikes on infrastructure and U.S. Central Command's 50,000 troops involvement
Reported dawn explosions in Tehran and Jerusalem as retaliatory strikes continue across Gulf

headlines.title: U.S. Senate advances toward vote on war powers resolution for Iran conflict
headlines.summary: Senate debates and nears vote on legislation challenging President Trump's Iran war decision, seeking congressional approval amid spreading Middle East fighting without clear U.S. exit. Impacts American military strategy and global alliances as conflict escalates.

headlines.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guards claim complete control of Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Iran asserts dominance over the vital oil shipping route, warning vessels of missile and drone risks amid explosions in Beirut. Threatens global energy trade and tanker traffic; U.S. and allies monitor for blockades impacting economies worldwide.

headlines.title: Pentagon identifies four U.S. Army Reserve soldiers killed in Iran war drone strike
headlines.summary: Four reservists from various states, aged 20 to 42, died Sunday when an Iranian drone hit a Kuwait command center; two others pending ID. Affects military families and highlights risks to 50,000 U.S. troops; underscores human cost of escalation.

framings.angle: Profiled soldiers as devoted parents and reservists supplying troops in logistics roles
Listed ages of four identified soldiers from initial six killed in Kuwait drone attack

headlines.title: President Trump threatens to halt U.S. trade with Spain over base access denial
headlines.summary: Trump targets Spain after it bars U.S. use of bases for Iran strikes, risking bilateral trade ties. Complicates NATO ally relations and U.S. logistics in Europe; could raise costs for American operations in Middle East.

headlines.title: European allies rush defenses to Cyprus after drones target British Akrotiri base
headlines.summary: Cypriot government blames Iran-backed Hezbollah for drone attack on UK RAF base; allies bolster island fortifications. Heightens Mediterranean tensions tied to Iran war; protects key logistics hub for regional strikes.

headlines.title: U.S. discusses potential Iran operation with Kurdish militias in Iraq
headlines.summary: U.S. consults Iranian Kurdish groups on attacking western Iran security forces amid ongoing war. Aims to weaken Tehran militarily; risks broader ethnic conflicts and escalation involving Iraq's semi-autonomous Kurdistan.

headlines.title: Israel strikes Hezbollah sites in Lebanese towns amid Iran war
headlines.summary: Israel targets multiple towns in Lebanon claiming hits on Hezbollah; explosions reported in Beirut. Builds on prior strikes killing dozens; advances Israeli goals against regional foes, straining fragile ceasefires.

headlines.title: United Nations warns of violence resurgence in South Sudan after 169 killed
headlines.summary: UN voices concern over weekend massacre with mass grave, attributing to intercommunal clashes amid instability. Risks full civil war return; threatens humanitarian aid and regional refugee flows near Sudan border.
headlines.previousContext: UN highlights mass grave and intercommunal violence amid political tensions following initial attack

framings.angle: Cited UN deep concern over massacre and mass grave in intercommunal attacks
Warned of civil war risk from government-opposition clashes near Sudan border

headlines.title: Rwanda-backed rebels advance into Goma city displacing one million
headlines.summary: Rebels overrun Congolese troops prompting gunfire and shelling in safe-haven city; U.N. reports 1 million displaced inside. Overwhelms aid hub; escalates eastern Congo crisis drawing Rwanda accusations.
headlines.previousContext: Gunfire and shelling reported as over one million displaced shelter in the city

headlines.title: NATO mounts first coordinated response to Baltic Sea cable sabotage
headlines.summary: Alliance activates operations after another deep-sea cable cut suspects hybrid attack on infrastructure. Protects critical undersea links for data and energy; signals heightened deterrence against Russia amid tensions.
headlines.previousContext: Alliance deploys coordinated assets following confirmed severance of additional cable
